creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comments #9 and #11)
> It don't have submodule, but this file have it.
It is not (and never was) a problem, the framework handles these cases just fine.

> Can I commit?
Well, as I don't quite agree with the patch, I'd rather handle it myself (it's in the queue).
